ddt:Target.Name: FrontCamera_HFE_V1.4
ddt:Target.Description:
[N] Initial Create 2008.6.16 XX4 M.Kamada mail: mio-kamada@mail.nissan.co.jp
[1] Delete Snapshot, Add DataMonitor 2008.6.20 XX4 M.Kamada mail: mio-kamada@mail.nissan.co.jp
[2] Modify to Naming Rule 2008.7.11 XX4 M.Kamada mail: mio-kamada@mail.nissan.co.jp
[3] Modify CANID Hex <--> Dec 2008.12.11 XX4 M.Kamada
[4] Modify Supproted check and Routine etc 2008.12.11 XX4 M.Kamada
[5] Update for HFE Front camera
[6] DTCs updated and adding of new DIDs
[7] Update DTC and Auto-aiming
[8] Modifeds Data Mnemonic 2018.04.20 BG Kim

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Item.Text: Blind Spot & Moving Object Alarm Buzzer
left and right flashing indicators OFF
left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator OFF
left flashing indicator OFF and right flashing indicator ON
left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator ON
Switch Press(request to change LDW ON/OFF status)

Data.Name: Vehicle width
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 3000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Yaw angle after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between -40 and 40 pixels with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Target Diameter
Data.Comment: Value between 200 and 1000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: TSR Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of TSR function

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Roll angle after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between -0.055 and 0.055 radians with a resolution of 0.0001220703125

Data.Name: PartNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: 5 derniers digits de la référence pièce

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 3000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
Data.Comment: Value between -1250 and 1250 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Z position
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2450 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Bottom
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 100 pixels with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Distance from front axle center to bumper
Data.Comment: Value between 0.3 and 1.323 m with a resolution of 0.001

Data.Name: Distance between target
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Distance of target from front axle center
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 20000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 5000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: AHL Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of AHL function

Data.Name: LDW Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of LDW function

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.Z position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Z position

Request.Name: DataRead.Distance from front axle center to bumper

DataItem.Name: Distance from front axle center to bumper

Request.Name: DataRead.Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center

Request.Name: DataRead.Height of the center of target from the ground

DataItem.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Z position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Z position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Distance from front axle center to bumper

DataItem.Name: Distance from front axle center to bumper

Request.Name: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center

Request.Name: DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

DataItem.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground
Height of the center of target from the ground
Distance of target from front axle center

DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Z position
DataWrite.Distance from front axle center to bumper
DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

Display.RequestName: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.Z position

Display.DataName: Distance of target from front axle center

Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Input.DataName: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Input.DataName: Camera position in the vehicle.Z position
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Z position

Input.DataName: Distance from front axle center to bumper
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Distance from front axle center to bumper

Input.DataName: Distance of target from front axle center
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

Input.DataName: Height of the center of target from the ground
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

Send.RequestName: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center
DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

Input.DataName: Distance of target from front axle center
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

Input.DataName: Height of the center of target from the ground
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

Label.Text: Distance from target to front axle center = 3000mm
Height from the center of target to the ground = 1450mm
